creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
You're right, the KDE-PIM libraries changed (in particular, changed **name**) since digikam 6.0 came out. I don't know why that didn't come out in exp-runs beforehand.

There is a digikam 6.2 release -- we've been lagging in that regard -- which might work; i'll look into updating the port this week.
